description: An IO officer must protect a friendly unit's social media presence from being hijacked or spoofed by an adversary.

nodes.task_description: Audit the security settings of the unit's official social media accounts.

expected_outcome.value: Officer identifies weak passwords and a lack of two-factor authentication.

nodes.task_description: Implement stronger security measures, including complex passwords and mandatory two-factor authentication.

expected_outcome.value: Officer successfully hardens the security of the accounts.

nodes.task_description: Monitor for any unauthorized login attempts or spoofed accounts and report them for takedown.

expected_outcome.value: Officer establishes a process for ongoing monitoring and defense of the accounts.
